revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:風土記, en:Fudoki); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:25, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/101119138 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:25, 26 February 2026 (UTC) __TOC__ == ページ冒頭部の曖昧さ回避について == 一番上のところに3:3のとありますが、3:2のの誤りでは? {{Unsigned-IPuser|219.172.83.13|2004-12-16 07:10:35 (UTC)}} :１項より２項が最初にくるべきでは？ そうしないと日本人自体に分かりにくいのではしようがない。{{Unsigned-IPuser|220.210.231.35|2005-07-14 16:00:16 (UTC)}} == 一部残存の風土記 == 一部残存の風土記について 山城国風土記は一部残っているのではないでしょうか？（伏見稲荷の由来「稲荷」等）これも後に書き直したのでしょうか？ {{Unsigned-IPuser|211.10.39.163|2007-02-15 21:35:49 (UTC)}} :写本や写本の一部が残されているものと、他の書物に「○○国風土記に曰く、･･･」と引用の形（[[逸文]]）で残されているものがあります。後者は風土記が残っていたのではなく、他の書物の中に風土記の記述が残されていたということななります。--[[利用者:弥|弥]] 2007年2月16日 (金) 10:10 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1249769004 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:25, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start|1= {{WikiProject Japan|importance=high|history=y}} {{WikiProject Anthropology|oral-tradition=yes }} }} ==Technically Not An Orphan, But...== Is there any way of adding a little more '''explanation''' for those reading this for the first time who are not [[Fudoki]] '''scholars''' ... you know, for the rest of the [[Gaijin]] out in the audience, especially since this doesn't have any in-line references. What should be done? [[User:Duende-Poetry|Duende-Poetry]] ([[User talk:Duende-Poetry|talk]]) 20:07, 28 November 2011 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:25, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified 2 external links on [[Fudoki]]. Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=804371475 my edit]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://archive.is/20130104042845/http://homepage2.nifty.com/toka3aki/geography/fudoki_itsu.html to http://homepage2.nifty.com/toka3aki/geography/fudoki_itsu.html *Added archive https://archive.is/20130104042845/http://homepage2.nifty.com/toka3aki/geography/fudoki_itsu.html to http://homepage2.nifty.com/toka3aki/geography/fudoki_itsu.html When you have finished reviewing my changes, you may follow the instructions on the template below to fix any issues with the URLs. {{sourcecheck|checked=false|needhelp=}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 15:34, 8 October 2017 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:25, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified one external link on [[Fudoki]]. Please take a moment to review [[special:diff/816402705|my edit]]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20071020104321/http://applepig.idv.tw/kuon/furu/text/fuudo/fundo_top.htm to http://applepig.idv.tw/kuon/furu/text/fuudo/fundo_top.htm When you have finished reviewing my changes, you may follow the instructions on the template below to fix any issues with the URLs. {{sourcecheck|checked=false|needhelp=}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 03:16, 21 December 2017 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:25, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

{{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:25, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/101119138 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:25, 26 February 2026 (UTC) __TOC__ == ページ冒頭部の曖昧さ回避について == 一番上のところに3:3のとありますが、3:2のの誤りでは? {{Unsigned-IPuser|219.172.83.13|2004-12-16 07:10:35 (UTC)}} :１項より２項が最初にくるべきでは？ そうしないと日本人自体に分かりにくいのではしようがない。{{Unsigned-IPuser|220.210.231.35|2005-07-14 16:00:16 (UTC)}} == 一部残存の風土記 == 一部残存の風土記について 山城国風土記は一部残っているのではないでしょうか？（伏見稲荷の由来「稲荷」等）これも後に書き直したのでしょうか？ {{Unsigned-IPuser|211.10.39.163|2007-02-15 21:35:49 (UTC)}} :写本や写本の一部が残されているものと、他の書物に「○○国風土記に曰く、･･･」と引用の形（[[逸文]]）で残されているものがあります。後者は風土記が残っていたのではなく、他の書物の中に風土記の記述が残されていたということななります。--[[User:弥|弥]] 2007年2月16日 (金) 10:10 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1249769004 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:25, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start|1= {{WikiProject Japan|importance=high|history=y}} {{WikiProject Anthropology|oral-tradition=yes }} }} ==Technically Not An Orphan, But...== Is there any way of adding a little more '''explanation''' for those reading this for the first time who are not [[Fudoki]] '''scholars''' ... you know, for the rest of the [[Gaijin]] out in the audience, especially since this doesn't have any in-line references. What should be done? [[User:Duende-Poetry|Duende-Poetry]] ([[User talk:Duende-Poetry|talk]]) 20:07, 28 November 2011 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:25, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified 2 external links on [[Fudoki]]. Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=804371475 my edit]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://archive.is/20130104042845/http://homepage2.nifty.com/toka3aki/geography/fudoki_itsu.html to http://homepage2.nifty.com/toka3aki/geography/fudoki_itsu.html *Added archive https://archive.is/20130104042845/http://homepage2.nifty.com/toka3aki/geography/fudoki_itsu.html to http://homepage2.nifty.com/toka3aki/geography/fudoki_itsu.html When you have finished reviewing my changes, you may follow the instructions on the template below to fix any issues with the URLs. {{sourcecheck|checked=false|needhelp=}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 15:34, 8 October 2017 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:25, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified one external link on [[Fudoki]]. Please take a moment to review [[special:diff/816402705|my edit]]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20071020104321/http://applepig.idv.tw/kuon/furu/text/fuudo/fundo_top.htm to http://applepig.idv.tw/kuon/furu/text/fuudo/fundo_top.htm When you have finished reviewing my changes, you may follow the instructions on the template below to fix any issues with the URLs. {{sourcecheck|checked=false|needhelp=}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 03:16, 21 December 2017 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:25, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] previous contributors were [[User:wikipedia>Tosatur]], [[User:Immanuelle]], [[User:EmmaBot]], see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Fudoki here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:25, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/101119138 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:25, 26 February 2026 (UTC) __TOC__ == ページ冒頭部の曖昧さ回避について == 一番上のところに3:3のとありますが、3:2のの誤りでは? {{Unsigned-IPuser|219.172.83.13|2004-12-16 07:10:35 (UTC)}} :１項より２項が最初にくるべきでは？ そうしないと日本人自体に分かりにくいのではしようがない。{{Unsigned-IPuser|220.210.231.35|2005-07-14 16:00:16 (UTC)}} == 一部残存の風土記 == 一部残存の風土記について 山城国風土記は一部残っているのではないでしょうか？（伏見稲荷の由来「稲荷」等）これも後に書き直したのでしょうか？ {{Unsigned-IPuser|211.10.39.163|2007-02-15 21:35:49 (UTC)}} :写本や写本の一部が残されているものと、他の書物に「○○国風土記に曰く、･･･」と引用の形（[[逸文]]）で残されているものがあります。後者は風土記が残っていたのではなく、他の書物の中に風土記の記述が残されていたということななります。--[[User:弥|弥]] 2007年2月16日 (金) 10:10 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1249769004 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:25, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start|1= {{WikiProject Japan|importance=high|history=y}} {{WikiProject Anthropology|oral-tradition=yes }} }} ==Technically Not An Orphan, But...== Is there any way of adding a little more '''explanation''' for those reading this for the first time who are not [[Fudoki]] '''scholars''' ... you know, for the rest of the [[Gaijin]] out in the audience, especially since this doesn't have any in-line references. What should be done? I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20071020104321/http://applepig.idv.tw/kuon/furu/text/fuudo/fundo_top.htm to http://applepig.idv.tw/kuon/furu/text/fuudo/fundo_top.htm When you have finished reviewing my changes, you may follow the instructions on the template below to fix any issues with the URLs. {{sourcecheck|checked=false|needhelp=}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 03:16, 21 December 2017 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:25, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
